newsSinceJun6: No new fundamental disclosures since June 6. Today's +7.48% to NT$63.2 (heavy volume, ~NT$4.2B turnover) is a flow-driven rebound after the stock spiked limit-up to NT$70.8 on June 4 on the AI-power theme (April revenue +34.6% YoY, Q1 net income +602% YoY, 33kW power shelf in mass production, 72kW in customer certification, OmniOn-based 1MW HVDC for 400V/800V) and then sold off ~17% to NT$58.8 by June 8. May monthly revenue (due by June 10) is not yet released. Crowding signals are now overt: limit-up theme coverage, retail 'should I buy' explainers, and sell-side fair-value ranges around NT$40-45 sit far below the current price.

sources.label: MoneyWeekly - AcBel limit-up to NT$70.8 on AI power theme (2026-06-04)
CMoney news - record revenue, OmniOn 1MW HVDC 400V/800V, analyst targets NT$40-45
WantGoo - 6282 monthly revenue (May 2026 not yet released)

verdicts.rankRationale: On a crowding-sensitive alpha list, the hidden-gem premise is eroding: a June 4 limit-up on theme money, retail explainer coverage, massive turnover, and today's +7.5% no-news rebound mean the rerating is happening without fresh fundamentals; yesterday's up-move captured the post-spike asymmetry, and today's bounce plus 44.3% YTD gives some of it back.
verdicts.bull: AcBel is a genuine rack-power bottleneck name: 33kW power shelves shipping, 72kW in certification, OmniOn-derived 1MW HVDC spanning 400V/800V architectures, with enterprise power already ~49% of April revenue and Q1 net income up 602% YoY.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis intact but discovery is largely complete; at ~NT$63 the stock trades ~22-23x estimated 2026 EPS of NT$2.8 and well above NT$40-45 sell-side fair-value ranges, so May revenue (due ~June 10) must beat to sustain the rerating.
verdicts.bear: A retail-driven theme stock that went limit-up, dropped 17% in three sessions, and bounced 7.5% on no news is trading on flow, not fundamentals; if May revenue or 72kW certification timing disappoints, the air pocket back toward the high-40s is large.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: May 2026 monthly revenue release (due by June 10) and 72kW power-shelf customer certification converting to orders.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowded retail positioning unwinding on any revenue or certification slip, with price far above sell-side fair-value anchors.
